title: Diamonds To Rubies
description: A texturepack that changes diamonds into rubies, including the item names!
body:
![From left to right: a block of ruby, a ruby sword, a ruby, a ruby chestplate, and ruby ore.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422a7fdaaddbce4d0f0cd5ad6ef950809d123da7.png)This resourcepacks makes diamonds look like rubies, while keeping the vanilla style, but also translates "diamond" stuff into "ruby" in supported languages! If you use an unsupported language - don't worry, the textures are still changed.
## Supported languages are:
- English (US, UK, NZ and AU)
- Polish

This includes tools, armor, armor trims, subtitles, blocks and achievements.

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne
